title: NVIDIA AI GPU demand remains the dominant global technology signal
title_zh: 輝達 AI GPU 需求仍是全球科技股最重要訊號，台灣半導體與 AI 伺服器供應鏈受惠
summary: AI accelerator demand continues to support the Taiwan semiconductor and AI server supply chain.
summary_zh: AI 判讀：AI 加速器需求延續，對台積電、廣達、緯創、緯穎與京元電子形成正向催化。

title: Cloud capex remains focused on AI server deployment
title_zh: 雲端資本支出持續聚焦 AI 伺服器部署，伺服器 ODM 與電源散熱供應鏈受關注
summary: Hyperscaler spending supports server ODMs, power solutions and thermal management names.
summary_zh: AI 判讀：雲端大型客戶仍投入 AI 伺服器，廣達、緯創、緯穎、台達電具較高關聯度。

title: CoWoS capacity remains a structural bottleneck for AI chips
title_zh: CoWoS 產能仍是 AI 晶片供應瓶頸，台積電 AI 營收能見度受到支撐
summary: Advanced packaging demand supports TSMC's AI revenue visibility.
summary_zh: AI 判讀：先進封裝需求維持高檔，台積電是最直接受影響個股。

title: Semiconductor sentiment improves with stronger chip demand
title_zh: 晶片需求改善帶動半導體氣氛回升，但選股仍需聚焦主線與技術面確認
summary: Global chip momentum supports Taiwan semiconductor names, although selectivity is needed.
summary_zh: AI 判讀：半導體動能偏正向，台積電、聯發科、京元電子、群聯受影響。

title: Investors remain cautious before Fed and inflation commentary
title_zh: Fed 與通膨評論前市場維持謹慎，高估值科技股短線風險升高
summary: Higher rate expectations can pressure high-valuation technology names.
summary_zh: AI 判讀：利率與通膨雜訊會壓抑科技股評價，AI 與半導體族群需避免追高。

title: Container shipping rates show selective improvement
title_zh: 貨櫃航運運價出現選擇性改善，長榮可觀察但不是今日科技主線
summary: Freight rate improvement may support shipping watchlist names but is not today's main technology signal.
summary_zh: AI 判讀：運價改善對長榮偏正向，但今日盤面主線仍以 AI 與半導體為主。
